operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_dmamove_run_descs
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun state_desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  state_desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (=  false (bvule  ?B1 (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun state_desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  state_desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  state_desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) (bvule  ?B1 (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: move_desc.length is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
